description_long: This house features a two-story rectangular structure with a blue wooden exterior and brown trim. The front facade is defined by a covered porch supported by four posts, providing a sheltered entryway. Large, white-framed windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The roof is a simple gable style with a slight overhang, covered in gray shingles. The house sits on a raised wooden platform, suggesting a foundation above ground level. The overall design evokes a classic American small-town or Western architectural style, with practical and straightforward detailing.
description: A two-story blue wooden house with a covered front porch, symmetrical white windows, and a gray gable roof on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the blue siding, two large windows, and the depth of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain blue wall, four windows, and no visible entryway or porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows and a partial view of the porch overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door under a covered porch with four supporting posts and a sloped overhang.
